overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through urban residential alleys and streets in Los Santos. The character navigates from a narrow alleyway onto a main street, walks along the sidewalk past parked vehicles and pedestrians, and crosses a street intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley with dumpsters and recycling bins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alley between apartment buildings

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with yellow stucco exterior and balconies
beige-colored apartment building with garage doors at street level
bright blue municipal recycling bins lined along the alley wall
large gray concrete waste containers with metal lids
elevated walkway connecting buildings with green railings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow urban alleyway flanked by residential apartment buildings. Blue recycling bins and concrete dumpsters line the path, while an overhead pedestrian bridge is visible ahead on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street corner with palm trees and utility poles

events.description: exits narrow alley into open street intersection with view of downtown skyline
character stops walking and looks around in both directions before proceeding

agents.ego_description: exits the alley, turns left onto the sidewalk, and pauses to survey the street before continuing

entered.detail: contemporary white building with geometric black window patterns across the street
tall wooden electrical poles with multiple cross-arms and wires
multi-lane paved street with red curbs and traffic markings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley onto a sunlit street corner, turning left onto the sidewalk. A modern white office building stands across the street while wooden utility poles line the road. The character pauses briefly to look around before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked cars and street trees

events.description: passing a black sports car parked at the curb on the right
pedestrian in yellow shirt walks past on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing various parked vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in yellow t-shirt and cap walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
small brown dog walking on the sidewalk near the building wall

entered.detail: two-story dark green residential building with yellow awning
sleek black convertible sports car parked at the red curb
white sports car with red racing stripe parked behind the black car
dark purple four-door sedan parked along the street
mature trees with dense green canopies shading the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a tree-lined sidewalk next to a busy street, passing several parked sports cars including a distinctive white vehicle with red stripes. A pedestrian in a yellow shirt and a small dog appear on the left, walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and commercial buildings ahead

events.description: character begins crossing the street at the intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan waiting at the traffic light at the intersection

entered.detail: traffic light suspended over the intersection showing green
vibrant multi-colored storefronts with large billboards visible ahead
red brick residential building with white trim at the corner
bright yellow fire hydrant at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a street intersection and begins crossing the road. Colorful commercial buildings with large signage are visible ahead, while a traffic light hangs overhead. A white car waits at the light as the character crosses the painted crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined urban alleyway into a bright, bustling city intersection. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow passage flanked by apartment buildings and concrete dumpsters, moving toward an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the character emerges from the shadows, the scene opens onto a sunlit street corner where the camera turns left past wooden utility poles and a modern white office building. The view then expands along a tree-lined sidewalk, passing parked sports cars and a pedestrian with a small dog before approaching a wide road. Finally, the camera follows the character across a painted crosswalk toward colorful commercial buildings and hanging traffic lights as a white car waits at the intersection.
